covid_surveillance.short_description: Weekly covid surveillance data from Minnesota Department of Health
covid_surveillance.long_description: Minnesota Department of Health collects and reports covid surveillance data weekly. Data covers emergency department visits, hospitalizations, laboratory-confirmed cases, and/or percent positivity.

mn_dph.name: Minnesota Department of Health
mn_dph.description: Minnesota Department of Health provides weekly respiratory surveillance data for Minnesota covering pathogens including: covid, influenza, rsv, adenovirus, coronavirus, metapneumovirus, parainfluenza, rhinovirus, ili . Data is published via state health department dashboards and reports. Temporal coverage: ~2019-ongoing. Geographic coverage: state level.
mn_dph.restrictions: Public domain state government health data.
